column10: No real changes. Perhaps just art? as a launcher itself it seems servicable

column3: Honestly, from what I’ve seen, I can’t really think of anything that could really be improved I think it’s fine and dandy the way it is!
column10: Could use more smiley faces to improve user happiness, and encourage positive emotions!
column11: I wish I had more to add here, but I think I’ve said my peace!

column3: From the demo it seems like you need to close the app and reopen it for new games to show up. Maybe add a refresh button so you don't have to do that.
column7: I imagine this wouldn't work for games that require specific mod loaders? Maybe it does work though so I don't know.
column10: Add navigation with the mouse maybe?
column11: Good job! I think having a launcher like this for easily launching and modding all sorts of games is something I would genuinely use.

column3: Not sure how it is installed but it seems like you simply drag a game into it and you can play the game through it. looks easy enough !
column7: I really know nothing at all about modding, as far as I understand it is a way to change a game to your liking illegally (?)
column10: Nothing would change, UI looks very nice and it seems easy to use ! Maybe a little info about what it is preceding this survey would be helpful
column11: I like how the ratchelor is on the list of games u have
